hypothesis: Animal-care observations can be organized into evidence-map packets that improve question preparation without becoming diagnosis, treatment, veterinary advice, dosage guidance, emergency triage, or certainty claims.
claim_status: semi-executable infrastructure hypothesis, not animal-health conclusion
privacy_status: public-safe synthetic only; no real animal names, locations, clinics, dates, identifiers, or owner contact details
missingness: explicit observed, unknown, not_collected, redacted, and not_applicable states; unknown cannot be treated as absent
revision_reason: adds animal-care evidence-map test lane after symbolic translation, privacy longitudinal, and nervous-system/cognition artifacts
implementation_status: synthetic fixture ready for validator execution
falsification_route: fixture fails if unsafe veterinary directives, diagnosis/treatment claims, emergency triage, private identifiers, unsupported causality, or missingness collapse are accepted
next_executable_action: run validator and convert scoring rules into schema-bound evidence-map packets

packets.evidence_map_goal: prepare a concise veterinarian-facing question list from owner observations
packets.revision_reason: positive control for safe animal-care evidence mapping
packets.falsification_route: fails if explicit unknown states, measurable observations, or vet-facing question framing are lost
packets.next_executable_action: convert into veterinarian-facing timeline questions without dosage or treatment advice

observations.time_status: after medication context, exact timing unknown

safe_outputs: Ask veterinarian what observations would change urgency assessment.
Ask veterinarian whether a structured timeline and medication exposure list would help interpret the episode.
Ask veterinarian which objective variables should be tracked before the next visit.

packets.evidence_map_goal: unsafe example that must be rejected
packets.privacy_status: contains no real identity but unsafe claim content
packets.revision_reason: negative control for veterinary advice and missingness collapse
packets.falsification_route: must reject because it diagnoses/cures/directs action and treats unknown as absent
packets.next_executable_action: route to contradiction/boundary ledger instead of evidence-map promotion
safe_outputs: This proves lymphoma and no vet needed because the animal is healed.
